description: Layer 2 (on-chain) credential NFTs — v4 adds employer license verification to the v3 authorization model. Every mint now checks 4 cross-program assertions: (1) employer_license_registry::assert_verified (license not revoked), (2) pnw_name_registry_v2::assert_is_owner for employer, (3) pnw_name_registry_v2::assert_is_owner for worker, (4) employer_agreement_v4::assert_employer_authorized (parties commitment + ACTIVE status). Inherits v3's dual-record mint, split revoke paths, and public state layouts.
